## Summary
What does this PR do? Briefly describe the feature or change 
and what problem it solves.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issue
Closes #[issue number]

## Technical Approach
Briefly explain the decisions you made in your implementation:
- What does the component do and how does it work?
- Were there any approaches you considered and rejected? Why?

## Screenshots
If this PR includes frontend changes, include a screenshot or screen recording of the feature working.

| Before | After |
| ------ | ----- |
|        |       |

## How to Test
Step-by-step instructions to verify the feature works:
1. Pull the branch and run `npm install`
2. Start the server with `npm start`
3. Navigate to [URL or component]
4. [Action to perform]
5. [Expected result]

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the team's agreed style and naming conventions
- [ ] No console.log statements left in the code
- [ ] I have tested this in the browser
- [ ] I have checked for console errors
- [ ] The feature works as described above
- [ ] I have linked the related issue above
